judgment.summary: Accenture demonstrates solid growth, strong profitability, and a healthy balance sheet with significant free cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported quarter beat EPS estimate by 3.3%; next earnings date is 2026-06-18.
positives: Revenue growth 8.3% YoY and earnings growth 4.0% YoY indicate steady business expansion.
Operating margin 13.8% and profit margin 10.6% show strong operational efficiency.
Return on equity at 24.8% and return on assets at 11.2% reflect excellent capital utilization.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $12.16B is substantial, supporting operations and shareholder returns.
Forward P/E of 11.85x suggests the stock is reasonably valued relative to future earnings expectations.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 25.47% is notable, though offset by strong cash flow.
Quarterly earnings growth of 2.1% is modest compared to YoY growth.
PEG ratio of 1.26 suggests growth may be priced in, though the forward P/E is attractive.

news.paragraph: Accenture plc (ACN) is being evaluated as a potentially affordable AI stock, according to recent headlines. While the company's core business is consulting and technology services, its positioning within the AI landscape is a key focus for investors. The upcoming earnings report on June 18th will be a critical catalyst to watch for any updates on AI-driven growth and future outlook.

headlines.title: Is Accenture plc (ACN) Among the Best Affordable AI Stocks to Buy Right Now?
